title: leucophyllum pringlei
intro: Leucophyllum pringlei, also known as Pringle's Texas Sage, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Leucophyllum pringlei include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Leucophyllum pringlei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
